text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Yes." "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet?" "No, I am, but..." "Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. And I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes?" "Yeah, but they don't ask me all of that on the phone." "Since you already have a Medicare plan, these credits can easily be processed on your account, please hold while I get that done for you." Thanks for going to think this is Adam. How are you doing today? "Okay, have a good day. Thank you for calling. Thank you."
